SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF BRIANA SCHWEIZER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YAFFA MEINERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2026 - JUDGMENT.
